subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Upon thee be the Glory of God! From every direction have the arrows of tribulation encompassed thee, yet the Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله علیک بهاء الله از هر جهتی از جهات سهام بلا احاطه نموده ولکن قلم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Hands of the Cause
